overall_verdict.interpretation: 17 families show substrate sensitivity. PyTorch provides value beyond numpy for: z_dephasing, x_dephasing, depolarizing, amplitude_damping, phase_damping, bit_flip, phase_flip, bit_phase_flip, unitary_rotation, CNOT, CZ, SWAP, iSWAP, cartan_kak, husimi_q, mutual_information, quantum_discord. Structural features: 1q families overrepresented.
